## Which aspect of the concept?

<!-- Pick one or more: -->

- [ ] Reality virtualization (the core abstraction)
- [ ] Semantic Events (input virtualization)
- [ ] Intent Proposals (action mediation)
- [ ] Deterministic World Policy (physics laws)
- [ ] Taint / Provenance tracking
- [ ] Comparison with existing approaches
- [ ] Other: ___

## Your feedback

What works? What doesn't? What's missing or unclear?

## Attack scenario this doesn't address

If you can think of an attack class that Agent Hypervisor wouldn't prevent, describe it here. These are the most valuable contributions.

## Alternative approaches

How would you solve this differently? What abstraction layer would you use?

## Your background / perspective (optional)

Security researcher, agent developer, AI safety, enterprise security — any context helps us understand where your feedback is coming from.
